creator: slk@acm.rpi.edu
text:
This is an update to the PR.

I'm not sure exactly how yet, but the problem appears to be 
strongly related to Realplayer 5.0 for Linux, running with
Linux emulation. 

Also, a correct e-mail address is slk@acm.rpi.edu.


I'm going to cvsup to the latest stable and do more testing.
-- 
Simon Karpen	karpes@rpi.edu		slk@acm.rpi.edu
#include <std_disclaimer.h>	I don't speak for RPI in any way.
"Those that give up essential liberty to obtain a little temporary
safety, deserve neither liberty nor safety."      --Ben Franklin
